svg.title: An LLM product is a multi-layer system
svg.desc: D2 generated diagram for An LLM product is a multi-layer system
svg.text: An LLM product is a multi-layer system
Before changing the model, isolate which layer failed.

text.tspan: Users meet workflows and recovery paths before they meet the model.
Model output must pass system validation.
Design state, retries, and idempotency together.
